parsed.recommendation_text: The ASUS ZenBook 14 offers remarkable value for a student, combining an OLED display with lightweight design and decent performance under $900. Despite its less powerful processor compared to competitors, it delivers a quality screen experience that is ideal for budget-conscious students who prioritize visual clarity over raw power. The laptop's port selection includes HDMI and USB-A, ensuring compatibility with various peripherals. While the speakers are tinny, this model provides an excellent balance of features and affordability.
parsed.selection_rationale: Balances price and quality well; OLED display is a standout feature.
